---
title: "mFast-SeqS results"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r load-data, include=FALSE}
source("R/load_and_process_data.R")
dir.create("results/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r colors-labels}
timepoint_arm_A_colors     <- c("BL" = "#A6C8E0", "PD" = "#4E79A7")
timepoint_arm_B_colors     <- c("BL" = "#F8C99B", "PD" = "#F28E2B")
timepoint_labels           <- c("BL" = "Baseline", "PD" = "Progression")
timepoint_both_arms_colors <- c("arm_A_BL" = "#A6C8E0", "arm_A_PD" = "#4E79A7",
                                "arm_B_BL" = "#F8C99B", "arm_B_PD" = "#F28E2B")
timepoint_both_arms_labels <- c("arm_A_BL" = "Baseline (combination treatment)",
                                "arm_A_PD" = "Progression (combination treatment)",
                                "arm_B_BL" = "Baseline (monotherapy)",
                                "arm_B_PD" = "Progression (monotherapy)")
```

```{r tf-estimates}
tf_estimates_ichorCNA <- estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    group_by(sampleName_shWGS) |>
    summarise(tumorFractionEstimate = unique(tumorFractionEstimate), .groups = "drop") |>
    left_join(meta_data, by = join_by(sampleName_shWGS)) |>
    arrange(desc(tumorFractionEstimate))
```

## Z-score summary

```{r zscore-summary}
fastqseq_zscores |>
    group_by(arm, timepoint) |>
    summarise(
        mean = mean(zscore),
        min  = min(zscore),
        max  = max(zscore),
        .groups = "drop"
    )
```

## Z-scores per patient

```{r zscore-arm-a}
fastqseq_zscores |>
    filter(arm == "arm_A") |>
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(patnr, patnr), y = zscore, fill = timepoint)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = timepoint_arm_A_colors) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(
        title = "Fastseq Z-scores of patients in combination treatment arm (AI + CDK4/6i)",
        x     = "Patient ID",
        y     = "Z-score"
    ) +
    theme(
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fastseq_results_zscore_arm_a.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 5)
```

```{r zscore-arm-b}
fastqseq_zscores |>
    filter(arm == "arm_B") |>
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(patnr, patnr), y = zscore, fill = timepoint)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = timepoint_arm_B_colors) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(
        title = "Fastseq Z-scores of patients in monotherapy arm (AI)",
        x     = "Patient ID",
        y     = "Z-score"
    ) +
    theme(
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fastseq_results_zscore_arm_b.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 5)
```

## Z-score vs tumor fraction

```{r zscore-vs-tf}
tf_estimates_ichorCNA |>
    left_join(fastqseq_zscores, by = join_by(patnr, arm, timepoint, sampleName_fastseq)) |>
    mutate(arm_timepoint = paste0(arm, "_", timepoint)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = zscore, y = tumorFractionEstimate, color = arm_timepoint)) +
    geom_smooth(aes(x = zscore, y = tumorFractionEstimate),
                color = "black", method = "lm", se = FALSE, alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = timepoint_both_arms_colors, labels = timepoint_both_arms_labels) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    ggpubr::stat_cor(p.accuracy = 0.001, method = "spearman", size = 5,
                     hjust = -0.1, cor.coef.name = "rho", color = "black") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 4, alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_light() +
    labs(
        title  = "mFast-SeqS selects high tumour load patients",
        x      = "mFast-SeqS Z-score",
        y      = "Tumour fraction estimate (sWGS)",
        color  = "Timepoint:"
    ) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)) +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.text      = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
ggsave("results/figures/fastseq_results_zscore_vs_tumour_fraction.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 6)
```

## Predict TF for samples without sWGS

```{r predict-tf}
tf_fastseq_scores <- tf_estimates_ichorCNA |>
    filter(!sampleName_fastseq %in% c("L10176")) |>
    left_join(fastqseq_zscores, by = join_by(patnr, arm, timepoint, sampleName_fastseq)) |>
    mutate(arm_timepoint = paste0(arm, "_", timepoint))

model_log <- lm(tumorFractionEstimate ~ log10(zscore), data = tf_fastseq_scores)
summary(model_log)$r.squared

new_data  <- data.frame(zscore = c(5.46, 120.8, 4.83))
predict(model_log, newdata = new_data, interval = "prediction")
```

```{r loo-validation}
loo_predictions <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(tf_fastseq_scores)), function(i) {
    train     <- tf_fastseq_scores[-i, ]
    test      <- tf_fastseq_scores[i, ]
    loo_model <- lm(tumorFractionEstimate ~ log10(zscore), data = train)
    tibble::tibble(
        predicted = predict(loo_model, newdata = test),
        observed  = test$tumorFractionEstimate
    )
})

cor.test(loo_predictions$observed, loo_predictions$predicted, method = "spearman")
sqrt(mean((loo_predictions$observed - loo_predictions$predicted)^2))
```


```{r}

```
